definition: inactive broad new-and-resale property index
revision_behaviour: Statistics Canada table 18-10-0169-01; inactive broad new-and-resale property index. The series is inactive and ends in 2021 Q4. It is not spliced to NHPI, resale, rent, or shelter CPI.
